global.description: The ad features a vibrant abstract background with prominent text elements.
global.visual_style: bright and modern with abstract elements
global.main_message: Encouraging users to engage with the app by claiming a reward.

elements.label: Abstract textured background
elements.description: A blurred, abstract background with a mix of colors and shapes, creating a dynamic and engaging visual effect.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A bold, blue logo with the text 'NeonArena' prominently displayed at the top, set against the abstract background.

elements.label: Level up today message
elements.description: A bright blue headline stating 'Level up today' with a subtext 'No ads in first week', centered in the middle of the ad.
elements.text_content: Level up today No ads in first week

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button at the bottom with the text 'Claim reward', designed to stand out against the background.
